figures.caption: Table 1: Comparison of HumDial-EIBench with existing benchmarks. A-S Conflict denotes Acoustic-Semantic Conflict.

Table 4: Scores on Task 3. D1: text empathy, scored by LLM judges (Qwen3-Omni / Gemini2.5-Pro); D2/D3: acoustic empathy / naturalness. Bold: best in column; underline: second best; italics: anomalous low.
Table 5: Accuracy (%) on Task 4. “Conflict” denotes samples where acoustic emotion contradicts text sentiment; “Nonconf.” denotes consistent samples. Bold: best in column; underline: second best.
Table 3: Accuracy (%) on Tasks 1 and 2. Bold: best in column; underline: second best.

Figure 1: Data construction and task overview of HumDial-EIBench. Left: Three-stage pipeline—Stage 1: Dialogue Script Design; Stage 2: Authentic Human Enactment and Quality Control; Stage 3: Multiple-Choice Reformulation and Distractor Construction. Right: Representative examples of the four tasks.
